title: chloris brachystachys
intro: Chloris brachystachys, also known as short-hairy feather grass, is a type of grass native to tropical Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant properties that help to loosen and clear mucus from the lungs. The health benefits of Chloris brachystachys include its ability to reduce inflammation, lower fever, and act as an antiseptic to prevent infections. Chloris brachystachys can be prepared as a herbal remedy in various forms, including tea, decoctions, and infusions, which are often used in traditional African medicine.
